title: Janam aur Naamkaran
summary: The birth and naming ceremony is one of the most joyous occasions in Awadhi culture.

paragraphs.awadhi: जादातर जनम कय रसम अउर नामकरन कय रसम कौने कौने समय पय होत है।
paragraphs.english: The birth and naming ceremonies take place at specific auspicious times.

paragraphs.awadhi: जनम अउर नामकरन कय रसन पंडित द्वारा शुभ दिन अउर तिथि देख के निश्चित कीन जात है ।
paragraphs.english: The rituals are fixed by the priest after checking an auspicious day and date.

paragraphs.awadhi: नामकरन के रसम मा मामा,नाना-नानी ,बुआ-फ़ुफ़ा,चाची मौसी ,दादी ,नानी सब लॊग नामकरन के रसम मा जा थीं आवा थी ।
paragraphs.english: For the naming ceremony, the maternal uncle, grandparents, aunts, and grandmother all came.

paragraphs.awadhi: जनम अउर नामकरन के रसम मा फ़ूल-फ़ल ,केला ,पूडी,सब्जी सब लागत है ।
paragraphs.english: Flowers, fruits, bananas, puri, and vegetables are all part of the celebration.

paragraphs.awadhi: ज़नम अउर नामकरन कय विधि निकासन है ।
paragraphs.english: The ceremony of birth and naming is called 'Nikasan'.

paragraphs.awadhi: जनम अउर नामकरन के रसम का निकासन कहा थीं वोहमा भोज हुअत है भोज मा पूडी -सब्जी,हलुआ ,दही खीर आदि भोज लगता है ।
paragraphs.english: This ceremony is called Nikasan — a feast is held with puri-sabzi, halwa, yogurt, and kheer.

paragraphs.awadhi: जनम अउर नामकरन के समय व्यवस्था वोहकय महतारी-बाप ,घर वालेन करा थीं ।
paragraphs.english: All arrangements are made by the child's parents and family.

title: Biaah ki Rasm
summary: The Awadhi wedding is a grand affair full of rituals, family gatherings, and traditional food.

paragraphs.awadhi: हमरे समाज मा शादी से सम्बन्धित रसम लगन,तिलक ,विवाह होत है ।
paragraphs.english: In our society, wedding rituals include the engagement (Lagan), Tilak ceremony, and the marriage.

paragraphs.awadhi: समान्यत: लडकी के घर पय बिआह कय रसम लडका अउर लडकी के बालिग होय पय होत है।
paragraphs.english: Generally, the wedding ceremony happens at the bride's home when the boy and girl come of age.

paragraphs.awadhi: बिआह कय रसम दिन के समय पंडित द्वारा वर अउर वधु कय जन्म पत्रिका देख के कीन जात है।
paragraphs.english: The wedding ritual is conducted during the day by the priest after checking the horoscopes of the bride and groom.

paragraphs.awadhi: बिआह के रसम मुख्यत: सिन्दूर दान ,सात फ़ेरा आदि हुअत है ।
paragraphs.english: The main wedding rituals are the Sindoor ceremony and the seven sacred rounds around the fire.

paragraphs.awadhi: बिआह के रसम मा घर के रिश्तेदार गाँव वाले बुआ ,काका ,फ़ुफ़ा,मामा,मौसी आदि लोग न्योता जा थीं ।
paragraphs.english: Family members, villagers, aunts, uncles — all were invited to the wedding ceremony.

paragraphs.awadhi: बिआह के पहिलेव भोज होत है बिआह के बादव भोज होय लाग अहय । भोज मा पुडी-सब्जी खीर मिठाई ,लडडू आदि खाना बनत है ।
paragraphs.english: There is a feast both before and after the wedding — with puri-sabzi, kheer, sweets, and laddoos.

paragraphs.awadhi: बिआह के रसम कय व्यवस्था अउर खर्चा लडकी के माँ-बाप उठावा थीं।
paragraphs.english: The bride's parents bear all the expenses and arrangements for the wedding.

title: Mrityu ki Rasm
summary: Awadhi mourning rituals reflect a deep respect for the departed and community solidarity.

paragraphs.awadhi: हमरे समाज मा मित्यु से सम्बन्धित रसम तेरहवीं अउर वरषी हुआ थै।
paragraphs.english: In our society, death-related rituals are the 13th-day ceremony (Terhaveen) and the annual memorial (Barsi).

paragraphs.awadhi: समान्यत: म्रित्यु कय रसम म्रित्यु वाले आदमी के घरे पय हुआ थै।
paragraphs.english: Generally, the death rituals take place at the home of the deceased person.

paragraphs.awadhi: ऊ मर गवा।
paragraphs.english: He passed away.

paragraphs.awadhi: म्रित्यु के रसम मा रिश्तेदार -नातेदार अउर गाँव घर न्योता जा थै ।
paragraphs.english: In the death rituals, relatives and villagers are all invited.

paragraphs.awadhi: मिर्त्यु कय रसम कय बिधि गउदान,तेरहवीं अउर वरषी अहय ।
paragraphs.english: The ritual procedures for death include Gaudan, the 13th-day ceremony, and the annual memorial.

title: Gaav ki Zindagi
summary: A glimpse into the daily rhythms of an Awadhi village through real spoken sentences.

paragraphs.awadhi: वे रोज स्कूल जा थें।
paragraphs.english: They used to go to school every day.

paragraphs.awadhi: हमरे घरे मा ढेर पेड अहय।
paragraphs.english: There are many trees at our home.

paragraphs.awadhi: गाँव कय ई सबसे पुरान पेड आय।
paragraphs.english: This is the oldest tree in the village.

paragraphs.awadhi: टैंक मा पानी नाही बाटय।
paragraphs.english: There is no water in the tank.

paragraphs.awadhi: खराब मौसम की वजह से हम सब गाँव नही जाय पाइन।
paragraphs.english: Due to bad weather, we all could not go to the village.

paragraphs.awadhi: वे हर दिन फ़ुटबाल खेला थें।
paragraphs.english: They used to play football every day.

paragraphs.awadhi: वे कपडा धोवत रही।
paragraphs.english: She was washing clothes.

paragraphs.awadhi: खाये के बाद सोया।
paragraphs.english: He slept after eating.
